org.springframework.data.mongodb.core

    Description
    default <V> QueryResultConverter<T,V>
    QueryResultConverter.andThen(QueryResultConverter<? super R, ? extends V> after)
    Returns a composed function that first applies this function to its input, and then applies the after function to the result.
    static <T> QueryResultConverter<T,T>
    QueryResultConverter.entity()
    Returns a function that returns the materialized entity.
